name: VI-RADS (Vesical Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: VI-RADS classification template for bladder cancer assessment on multiparametric MRI

rads.recommendation: Consider repeat biopsy or TURBT for staging
rads.lesionLocation: [Right/Left] lateral wall / trigone / dome / anterior wall

findings.technique: Multiparametric bladder MRI performed including T2-weighted, DWI, and DCE sequences at [X]T field strength.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior CT / prior cystoscopy] from [date].

sections.name: T2-Weighted
sections.content: Lesion appears [polypoid / sessile / flat]. Signal intensity: [hyperintense / intermediate / hypointense] relative to urine. Invasion depth: [uncertain / up to lamina propria / into muscularis propria].

sections.name: DWI
sections.content: DWI shows [restricted diffusion / no restricted diffusion] in lesion. Signal on high b-value images: [hyperintense / intermediate]. ADC value: [X] x10-3 mm2/s.

sections.name: DCE
sections.content: Dynamic contrast enhancement: [early enhancement / late enhancement] pattern. [Continuous / interrupted]enhancement of lamina propria. Smooth / irregular interface with muscularis propria.

sections.name: Muscle Invasion
sections.content: Muscle layer: [intact / focally disrupted / extensively involved]. Confidence for MI-UC: [low / intermediate / high].

sections.name: Stroma Invasion
sections.content: Stromal invasion: [present / absent / uncertain]. If present, extent: [focal / extensive].

impression:
1. VI-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Lesion type] in [location] measuring [X]cm
3. Muscle invasion: [present/absent/uncertain] (VI-RADS score: [X])
4. [Lymph node / hydronephrosis / extravesical] status: [findings]
5. [TURBT / cystectomy / follow-up] recommended based on findings
author: RadReport Templates
